problem: Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it?
hypothesis: If Aerogel porosity for thermal/acoustic insulation is applied to instability, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 15 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
